mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO album_picture(album_id, file_id, user_id) VALUES
(#{albumId}, #{fileId}, #{userId})
mapper.select:
SELECT album.*, first_cover.thumbnail_url AS coverUrl, COALESCE(file_stats.imageCount, 0) AS imageCount, COALESCE(file_stats.videoCount, 0) AS videoCount FROM album LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ap.album_id, file.thumbnail_url, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ap.album_id ORDER BY ap.is_cover DESC, ap.id) AS rn FROM album_picture ap JOIN file ON ap.file_id = file.file_id WHERE ap.user_id = #{userId} AND ap.album_id = #{albumId} ) first_cover ON album.album_id = first_cover.album_id AND first_cover.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ap.album_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN f.category = 'image' THEN 1 END) AS imageCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN f.category = 'video' THEN 1 END) AS videoCount FROM album_picture ap JOIN file f ON ap.file_id = f.file_id WHERE ap.user_id = #{userId} AND ap.album_id = #{albumId} GROUP BY ap.album_id ) file_stats ON album.album_id = file_stats.album_id
album.user_id = #{userId} and album.album_id = #{albumId}

SELECT #{locationLevel} as locationLevel,
country AS locationValue
CONCAT(country,',', province) AS locationValue
CONCAT(province,',', city) AS locationValue
CONCAT(city,',', district) AS locationValue
,
SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT(f.thumbnail_url ORDER BY f.date_time_original DESC SEPARATOR '|||'), '|||', 1 ) AS coverUrl, COUNT(uf.file_id) AS total FROM user_file uf INNER JOIN file f ON uf.file_id = f.file_id INNER JOIN location l ON uf.file_id = l.file_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 -- 假设相册只包含图片 GROUP BY
l.country l.country, l.province l.province, l.city l.city, l.district

SELECT sub.make AS makeName, sub.model AS modelName, sub.cover_url, sub.total FROM ( SELECT f.make, f.model, f.thumbnail_url AS cover_url, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY f.make, f.model) AS total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.make, f.model ORDER BY f.date_time_original DESC) AS rn FROM file f INNER JOIN user_file uf ON f.file_id = uf.file_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 0 ) sub WHERE sub.rn = 1 ORDER BY makeName

delete.foreach: DELETE FROM album WHERE album_id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
